full_text:
Tian Chang
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tian Chang. An officer under Deng Ai during the invasion of Shu. Defeated three Shu detachments. Tian Chang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
